top_findings.title: Match date range filtering not fully implemented
top_findings.evidence: tools.go:23-49 search_matches tool schema has no date_start/date_end parameters; SearchMatches function (tools.go:224-299) filters by season/competition/team but not by date range
top_findings.suggestion: Add date_start and date_end parameters to search_matches tool schema and implement date-based filtering in SearchMatches function
